ability.changed.switch_transfur_mode.des: Change how you transfur other entities.
ability.changed.switch_transfur_mode.non: You cannot transfur other entities as this form.
ability.changed.switch_transfur_mode.abs: Absorption: Envelop the entity and become one. Gain a significant health and hunger boost.
ability.changed.switch_transfur_mode.rep: Replication: Clone your likeness upon the entity. Gain a small health and hunger boost, and an extra hand in the fight.
ability.changed.switch_hands.desc: Extra hands make for deft work. You can effortlessly switch items with your other hands.
ability.changed.hypnosis.desc: Your hypnotic allure grasps onto others' attention. Affected entities are frozen in place looking at you.
ability.changed.siren_sing.desc: Your beautiful voice disrupts others' attention. Affected entities move randomly.
ability.changed.slither.desc: Your serpentine form is nimble, allowing you to traverse narrow passages with ease.
ability.changed.puddle.desc: Reduce your form into a puddle that slows trespassers.
ability.changed.summon_sharks.desc: Call upon your brethren to aid you. Summon two sharks in nearby water to fight for you.
ability.changed.toggle_night_vision.desc: Your eyes are attuned to sparse lighting conditions.
ability.changed.toggle_wave_vision.desc: Change your perception of the world. Crystalline and familiar materials resonate from your waves.
ability.changed.grab_entity.desc: Hold onto an entity to either transfur them or to protect them.
attribute.name.changed.transfur_damage.d: How capable you are of transfurring enemies (Only applies while transfurred).
attribute.name.changed.transfur_toleranc: How well you can resist being transfurred.
attribute.name.changed.grab_struggle_str: How quick you can break free from a grab.
attribute.name.changed.sprint_speed.desc: Multiplies your speed while sprinting (Only applies while transfurred).
attribute.name.changed.sneak_speed.desc: Multiplies your speed while sneaking (Only applies while transfurred).
attribute.name.changed.air_capacity.desc: How much air you can retain (Only applies while transfurred).

changed.compact_disc.content.light_latex: In our attempts to cure the outbreak, we realized only animals seem to be treatable. So we tried making humans more like animals. We finally made progress upon the creation of the Latex Base, a material that changes DNA on the fly. We CAN end the outbreak.
changed.compact_disc.content.aerosol_lat: After long restless nights, I finally made my contribution to the database. I found the light latex wolves to be boring, so I mixed in some Brown Dye, and created, well, something not as bland.
changed.compact_disc.content.dark_latex_: As noted previously, only animals can receive treatment for the outbreak. In our attempts to transfur humans, we've create a masked wolf-like creature by mixing Latex Base and Black Dye into a syringe. Further testing is advised.

After using the same base for the dark latex wolf, but adding a Feather too, we created a creature capable of gliding, but is unable to fly. The creature is slightly similar to a dragon, and also has a mask.
changed.compact_disc.content.dark_dragon: Although this creature stems from the dark latex wolf, it surprisingly doesn't have the mask. The bi-pedal "Dragon" is capable of gliding. Mixing a Phantom Membrane alongside the Dark Latex Wolf recipe, creates the DNA for the Dragon.
changed.compact_disc.content.beifeng: Mixing Blue Dye with the Latex Base created a lizard-like creature. They can run quite fast, swimming is average.
changed.compact_disc.content.latex_shark: The sharks we created actually can breathe underwater, although they are slightly slower on land than most other creatures, their swim speed is unmatched.
changed.compact_disc.content.latex_tiger: We created a variant on the regular shark, it's faster on land but it's not as fast in water.
changed.compact_disc.content.latex_orca: Alongside the shark, we created an orca.
changed.compact_disc.content.latex_squid: Not only can it breathe underwater, the Squid-Dog can also carry more items in it's extra hands.
changed.compact_disc.content.white_latex: This experiment is by far the most bizarre. It's genetic makeup allows it to dissolve into and swim in it's own material. More testing is needed.
changed.compact_disc.content.special_lat: Thanks to wonderful contributors, we had enough funding to test a very volatile latex variant. It seems to be unique to each patient we tested with.
